"I can't stop thinking about what I said to her..."

Your coach Asleep. Next session is Thursday.
Your best friend Has their own problems. You don't want to burden them.

FE

"I'm here. Tell me what's on your mind."

How to Connect

Three ways to reach Ferni

Call

Dial 1 (484) 481-3081 from any phone. No app needed. Just talk naturally.

Call now →

Text

Send a message to the same number. Perfect for quiet moments.

Send a text →

Web App

Open the app on any device. Voice, text, or video—your choice.

Open app →

FAQ

Common questions

How is this different from talking to a friend or coach?

Your best friend forgets what you told them last week. Your coach has other clients. We remember everything—every breakthrough, every struggle, every detail. And we're always here, with the same presence at 3am as 3pm.

Is my data private and secure?

Absolutely. All conversations are end-to-end encrypted. We never sell your data. You own your data and can export or delete it at any time. We're GDPR and CCPA compliant.

Can I really call or text a phone number?

Yes! Dial 1 (484) 481-3081 from any phone—landline or mobile, anywhere in the world. No app download required. Just call and start talking.

What if I need to cancel?

Cancel anytime with one click. No questions, no hoops, no guilt. We want you here because it's working, not because you're stuck.

Ready to be heard?

No app to download. No account needed to try. Just pick up your phone and call.

1 (484) 481-3081 We'll be here. Always.
Start in the web app
